cards.name: myofibro_fraction_high_signal
cards.description: Checks fibroblast activation under high biochemical signaling.
cards.action_plan: No immediate tuning required; retain as anchor constraint.

cards.description: Checks integrated profibrotic signaling index under high signal.
cards.action_plan: No immediate tuning required; retain as anchor constraint.

cards.description: Checks collagen/fibre alignment response under mechanical loading.
cards.action_plan: No immediate tuning required; retain as anchor constraint.

cards.name: collagen_fraction_load_signal
cards.description: Checks fibrosis burden under combined load + signaling.

cards.description: Checks elevated collagen burden in infarct core.
cards.action_plan: No immediate tuning required; retain as anchor constraint.

cards.name: infarct_core_to_remote_ratio
